question: As defined in ANR-101,"recreation purpose" means any pursuit or activity engaged in for enjoyment, relaxation or leisure. However, this does not include:

options.text: An individual flying a UA for fun in line with CAAS' operating conditions.
An individual flying for a sporting activity that forms part of an organised group activity.
An individual flying within his private property for practice.
An individual flying a UA higher than 200 feet above mean sea level for aerial photography for personal collection.
